title: Headroom: The Netflix Tool That Makes AI Agents 10x Cheaper
summary: Headroom is an open-source compression tool that reduces token consumption in AI agents by 60-95% by compressing agent inputs, tool outputs, code files, and RAG results before they reach the LLM. Built by a Netflix engineer, it uses locally trained Kompress-based models to perform compression at zero token cost and supports on-demand retrieval of full content via breadcrumb hashes.
